name: Alex Rivera
title: Senior Product Manager
summary: Senior Product Manager with 8 years of experience building consumer and B2B SaaS products. Track record of launching 0-to-1 products and scaling them to millions of users. Strong technical background with experience working closely with engineering and data teams.

experience.title: Senior Product Manager
experience.description: Led a team of 3 PMs building the core analytics platform. Grew DAU 40% through a personalization initiative.

experience.title: Product Manager
experience.description: Owned the onboarding flow end to end. Reduced time-to-value from 14 days to 3 days.
